title: [SCFToCalyx] [StaticLogicToCalyx] Pull out while-operation interface.
body:
The two lowering conversions use a similar interface for the `while` control flow. This attempts to use this knowledge to have a single class for both, rather than perform runtime casts. 

This also begins cleaning up mentions of SCF in StaticLogicToCalyx, and pipelines in SCFToCalyx.
